name: DoIP_SetEID, DoIP_SetGroupIdentification, DoIP_SetVIN
title: DoIP_SetEID, DoIP_SetGroupIdentification, DoIP_SetVIN
syntax: void DoIP_SetGroupIdentification(byte GID[], dword furtherActionRequired, dword VINGIDsyncStatus);
description: Configures the Vehicle Announcement/Vehicle Identification Response Message sent by a vehicle simulation.

parameters.name: EID
parameters.description: Send this entity ID in the message, e.g. a MAC address.

parameters.name: GID
parameters.description: Send this group identity in the message, e.g. a MAC address.

parameters.name: VINGIDsyncStatus
parameters.description: 0: VIN and GID are synchronized (default)0x10: VIN and GID are NOT synchronized; the tester should repeat the Vehicle Identification Request.

parameters.name: VIN
parameters.description: Vehicle Identification Number sent in the message.

description: These values can also be configured in the DoIP.INI file.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
